page.title: Outline

emptyWork.body: Select a work on the Works page before editing the outline.

page.emptyStages: No stage tree yet. Choose a story structure with stages on the Works page, configure the LLM connection in Settings, then click “Generate stage tree”.

assistant.title: Outline assistant
assistant.hint: Select a stage or chapter on the left to edit it here.

chapters.reorderHint: Drag-and-drop reorder is unavailable while filtering or searching. Clear them to restore it.
chapters.empty: No chapters match the current filters.

stagePanel.title: Stage: {{name}}
stagePanel.overviewPlaceholder: Key plot direction for this stage… (type @ to mention worldbuilding)

chapterPanel.title: Chapter {{number}}
chapterPanel.summaryPlaceholder: What happens in this chapter… (type @ to mention worldbuilding)

regenerateDialog.title: Regenerate stage tree
regenerateDialog.body: Regenerating replaces the current stage tree, synopses, and chapter outlines. This cannot be undone. Continue?

deleteDialog.title: Delete chapter
deleteDialog.body: Delete chapter {{number}}? This cannot be undone.

errors.needStructure: Choose a story structure with stages for this work first
errors.needStages: Generate the stage tree and assign chapters first
errors.chapterWrongWork: Chapter does not belong to this work
errors.missingUrl: LLM endpoint URL is not configured
errors.jsonParseFailed: Could not parse JSON from the LLM response

addInspiration.label: Add selection to inspirations

addEntity.label: Add selection to worldbuilding
addEntity.emptySelection: Select text to add to worldbuilding

linkEntity.label: Link selection to an existing setting (@)
linkEntity.emptySelection: Select text to link as a setting reference
linkEntity.alreadyLinked: Selection is already a setting reference

linkEntity.duplicateName: Multiple settings named “{{name}}”. Distinguish them on the Worldbuilding page
